---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: On this page
    number-sections: false
    anchor-sections: true
    page-layout: full
    html-math-method: mathjax
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* ── Research page custom styles ── */
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Merriweather:ital,wght@0,700;1,400&display=swap');

.rp-hero {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1B4F72 0%, #148F77 60%, #1E8449 100%);
  border-radius: 18px;
  padding: 3rem 2.5rem;
  color: white;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.rp-hero::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: -60px; right: -60px;
  width: 220px; height: 220px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  border-radius: 50%;
}
.rp-hero::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: -40px; left: -40px;
  width: 160px; height: 160px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
  border-radius: 50%;
}
.rp-hero h1 {
  font-family: 'Merriweather', serif;
  font-size: 2rem;
  color: white !important;
  border: none !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
}
.rp-hero p {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  line-height: 1.8;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
  max-width: 820px;
}
.rp-hero .tagline {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 300;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  color: #AED6F1;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  font-style: italic;
}

/* ── Stats banner ── */
.rp-stats {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1.2rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-top: 2rem;
}
.rp-stat {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 0.7rem 1.4rem;
  text-align: center;
  backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
  min-width: 110px;
}
.rp-stat .num {
  font-size: 1.6rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #FFFFFF;
  display: block;
}
.rp-stat .lbl {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

/* ── Section chip headings ── */
.rp-section-chip {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1B4F72, #148F77);
  color: white !important;
  padding: 6px 22px;
  border-radius: 30px;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  margin: 2rem 0 1.2rem 0;
  box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(27,79,114,0.2);
}

/* ── Pillar cards ── */
.rp-pillars {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.3rem;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
.rp-pillar {
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 1.5rem 1.4rem;
  background: #ffffff;
  box-shadow: 0 3px 16px rgba(27,79,114,0.09);
  border-top: 4px solid #148F77;
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  position: relative;
}
.rp-pillar:hover {
  transform: translateY(-5px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(27,79,114,0.16);
}
.rp-pillar .icon {
  font-size: 2rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  display: block;
}
.rp-pillar h4 {
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1B4F72 !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.rp-pillar p {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  color: #4A5568;
  line-height: 1.6;
  margin: 0;
}
.rp-pillar.p1 { border-top-color: #148F77; }
.rp-pillar.p2 { border-top-color: #2E86C1; }
.rp-pillar.p3 { border-top-color: #1E8449; }
.rp-pillar.p4 { border-top-color: #E67E22; }
.rp-pillar.p5 { border-top-color: #8E44AD; }

/* ── Project cards ── */
.rp-projects {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.4rem;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
.rp-project {
  background: #ffffff;
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 1.4rem 1.5rem;
  box-shadow: 0 3px 16px rgba(27,79,114,0.09);
  border-left: 5px solid #1B4F72;
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
}
.rp-project:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(27,79,114,0.15);
}
.rp-project.col-teal { border-left-color: #148F77; }
.rp-project.col-green { border-left-color: #1E8449; }
.rp-project.col-amber { border-left-color: #E67E22; }
.rp-project.col-navy  { border-left-color: #1B4F72; }
.rp-project.col-purple { border-left-color: #8E44AD; }

.rp-project .proj-tag {
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #148F77;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.rp-project h4 {
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.97rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1B4F72 !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.45rem;
  line-height: 1.35;
}
.rp-project p {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #4A5568;
  line-height: 1.6;
  margin: 0;
}
.rp-project .proj-status {
  margin-top: 0.8rem;
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  padding: 3px 10px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  font-weight: 600;
}
.status-active { background: #D5F5E3; color: #1E8449; }
.status-complete { background: #D6EAF8; color: #1B4F72; }
.status-funded { background: #FDEBD0; color: #E67E22; }

/* ── Publications ── */
.rp-pub-list { list-style: none; padding: 0; }
.rp-pub-list li {
  background: #ffffff;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 1.1rem 1.4rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(27,79,114,0.07);
  border-left: 4px solid #148F77;
}
.rp-pub-list li:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(27,79,114,0.13); }
.pub-num {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #1B4F72;
  color: white;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  width: 22px; height: 22px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  text-align: center;
  line-height: 22px;
  margin-right: 8px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.pub-title { font-weight: 600; color: #1B4F72; font-size: 0.95rem; }
.pub-journal { color: #148F77; font-style: italic; font-size: 0.87rem; }
.pub-authors { color: #5D6D7E; font-size: 0.83rem; margin: 3px 0; }
.pub-me { color: #1E8449; font-weight: 700; }
.pub-actions { margin-top: 0.5rem; display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.pub-btn {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  border: 1.5px solid currentColor;
  text-decoration: none;
  background: transparent;
  transition: background 0.15s;
}
.pub-btn:hover { opacity: 0.8; }
.btn-doi { color: #1B4F72; }
.btn-doi:hover { background: rgba(27,79,114,0.08); }
.btn-pdf { color: #1E8449; }
.btn-pdf:hover { background: rgba(30,132,73,0.08); }

/* ── Grant cards ── */
.rp-grants {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.2rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.rp-grant {
  background: #ffffff;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 1.2rem 1.3rem;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(27,79,114,0.08);
  border-top: 4px solid #E67E22;
  transition: transform 0.2s;
}
.rp-grant:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); }
.rp-grant .amount {
  font-size: 1.4rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #E67E22;
}
.rp-grant .funder {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  color: #5D6D7E;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.rp-grant h4 { font-size: 0.88rem; color: #1B4F72 !important; font-weight: 600; margin: 0; }
.rp-grant.pending { border-top-color: #8E44AD; }
.rp-grant.pending .amount { color: #8E44AD; }

/* ── Presentation timeline ── */
.rp-timeline { position: relative; padding-left: 2rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
.rp-timeline::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: 7px; top: 0; bottom: 0;
  width: 2px;
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #148F77, #1B4F72, #E67E22);
  border-radius: 2px;
}
.rp-timeline-item {
  position: relative;
  padding: 0.8rem 0 0.8rem 1rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #EBF5FB;
}
.rp-timeline-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.rp-timeline-item::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: -1.7rem;
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  width: 12px; height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #148F77;
  border: 2px solid white;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #148F77;
}
.rp-timeline-item .tl-year {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  color: #E67E22;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.rp-timeline-item .tl-title {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1B4F72;
  line-height: 1.35;
}
.rp-timeline-item .tl-venue {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: #5D6D7E;
  font-style: italic;
}
.rp-timeline-item .tl-type {
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  margin-left: 6px;
  vertical-align: middle;
}
.type-oral { background: #D5F5E3; color: #1E8449; }
.type-poster { background: #D6EAF8; color: #2E86C1; }
.type-invited { background: #FDEBD0; color: #E67E22; }

</style>

<!-- ── HERO ── -->
<div class="rp-hero">
  <div class="tagline">From barn records to breakthrough insights</div>
  <h1>Research Overview</h1>
  <p>
    I turn the messy, longitudinal data of commercial livestock production into analytics that matter —
    to the producer making culling decisions at 5 a.m., to the company modeling profitability across
    10,000 sows, and to the scientist building the next generation of precision animal health tools.
    My work lives at the intersection of <strong>epidemiology</strong>, <strong>applied machine learning</strong>,
    and <strong>production economics</strong>, with a singular focus: translate numbers into decisions.
  </p>
  <div class="rp-stats">
    <div class="rp-stat"><span class="num">5</span><span class="lbl">Publications</span></div>
    <div class="rp-stat"><span class="num">10+</span><span class="lbl">Presentations</span></div>
    <div class="rp-stat"><span class="num">$110K</span><span class="lbl">Grants Awarded</span></div>
    <div class="rp-stat"><span class="num">$300K</span><span class="lbl">Under Review</span></div>
    <div class="rp-stat"><span class="num">3</span><span class="lbl">Active Projects</span></div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Research Vision {#research-vision}

Commercial swine production generates extraordinary amounts of data — every breeding event, every litter born, every sow removed records a signal. Yet most of that signal stays trapped in software dashboards, never translated into predictive intelligence. My research challenges that gap.

I ask: *What does the data already know that the producer doesn't?*

Working with large-scale, longitudinal production datasets, I build models that identify which sows are at risk before they fail, which gilts will stay productive through multiple parities, and which management decisions yield the greatest return under real-world economic constraints. The analytics I develop are not academic exercises — they are designed to be used, understood, and acted upon at the barn level.

```{=html}
<div class="rp-section-chip">🔬 Research Pillars</div>

<div class="rp-pillars">

  <div class="rp-pillar p1">
    <span class="icon">📈</span>
    <h4>Longitudinal Performance Modeling</h4>
    <p>Modeling sow- and parity-specific trajectories over time to predict reproductive outcomes, longevity, and lifetime productivity — treating production records as the time-series data they truly are.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-pillar p2">
    <span class="icon">🤖</span>
    <h4>Explainable Machine Learning</h4>
    <p>Developing transparent, interpretable ML models that translate complex multivariate patterns into producer-ready decision rules — prediction with purpose, not just prediction with accuracy.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-pillar p3">
    <span class="icon">🌽</span>
    <h4>Production Economics & Decision Support</h4>
    <p>Partial budgeting, scenario simulation, and economic modeling of sow removal, replacement, and retention decisions — quantifying the dollar value of better data-driven choices.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-pillar p4">
    <span class="icon">🛡️</span>
    <h4>Epidemiology & Sentinel Surveillance</h4>
    <p>Designing anomaly detection pipelines using reproductive and performance indicators to flag herd deviations early — surveillance that protects both animal health and economic outcomes.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-pillar p5">
    <span class="icon">🧬</span>
    <h4>One Health & Antimicrobial Stewardship</h4>
    <p>Bridging animal production, food safety, and public health through resistance profiling, milk quality analytics, and evidence-based frameworks for antimicrobial use on-farm.</p>
  </div>

</div>
```

## Active Research Projects {#active-projects}

```{=html}
<div class="rp-section-chip">⚙️ Current & Recent Projects</div>

<div class="rp-projects">

  <div class="rp-project col-teal">
    <div class="proj-tag">PhD Dissertation · Swine Efficiency</div>
    <h4>Applied Data Analytics for Breeding Herd Efficiency in Commercial Swine Production</h4>
    <p>A longitudinal, multi-parity analysis of sow performance trajectories to identify biological and management drivers of farrowing success, retention, and lifetime economic return. Uses mixed models, survival analysis, and ML classifiers on commercial herd data.</p>
    <span class="proj-status status-active">● Active — Exp. 2027</span>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-project col-green">
    <div class="proj-tag">Funded · Pig Livability Grant</div>
    <h4>Predicting Farrowing Success to Inform Breeding Decisions</h4>
    <p>Building ML models that classify risk of farrowing failure at the individual sow level prior to breeding — enabling producers to make proactive, data-backed decisions rather than reactive post-failure ones. Presented at AI in Veterinary Medicine Symposium (2026).</p>
    <span class="proj-status status-funded">● Funded · $30,000</span>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-project col-amber">
    <div class="proj-tag">Funded · Pig Livability Grant</div>
    <h4>Early Identification of High-Risk Piglets in Commercial Swine Systems</h4>
    <p>Developing algorithms to flag at-risk piglets in the first days of life using routinely collected production indicators. Targets mortality reduction by shifting from reactive intervention to early, targeted management.</p>
    <span class="proj-status status-funded">● Funded · $30,000</span>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-project col-navy">
    <div class="proj-tag">Funded · ISU VPR</div>
    <h4>Precision Sow Management System (PSMS)</h4>
    <p>A platform integrating real-time production data with predictive modeling to support breeding, nutrition, and culling decisions at scale. Connects multiple analytical modules into a unified decision-support framework for commercial operations.</p>
    <span class="proj-status status-funded">● Funded · $50,000</span>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-project col-purple">
    <div class="proj-tag">Under Review · USDA-CARE</div>
    <h4>Unravelling Predictors of Sow Retention, Productivity & Profitability</h4>
    <p>A comprehensive study linking parity-level performance metrics, management variables, and economic indicators to identify what actually drives long-term sow value — and what separates a sustainable producer from a struggling one.</p>
    <span class="proj-status status-active">● Under Review · $300,000</span>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-project col-teal">
    <div class="proj-tag">Real-Time Surveillance · Pig Livability</div>
    <h4>Mortality Surveillance System for Wean-to-Finish Lots</h4>
    <p>Building real-time anomaly detection pipelines that use mortality patterns and health indicators to flag emerging disease events — transforming reactive loss reporting into proactive herd health intelligence.</p>
    <span class="proj-status status-funded">● Funded · $30,000</span>
  </div>

</div>
```

## Publications {#publications}

```{=html}
<div class="rp-section-chip">📄 Peer-Reviewed Publications</div>

<ul class="rp-pub-list">

  <li>
    <div style="display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:10px;">
      <span class="pub-num">5</span>
      <div>
        <div class="pub-authors">
          <span class="pub-me">Kirwa, E.</span>, Peterson, B., Grohmann, C. J., Silva, G. S., Ulguim, R. R., Mellagi, A. P., &amp; Frizzo, M.
        </div>
        <div class="pub-title">Assessment of the relationship between lactation feeding patterns, litter performance measures, and sow characteristics on sow farrowing efficiency metrics.</div>
        <div class="pub-journal">Journal of Animal Science, 2025 · 103(Supplement_1), 50–52</div>
        <div class="pub-actions">
          <a class="pub-btn btn-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.1093/jas/skaf102.055" target="_blank">DOI ↗</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li>
    <div style="display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:10px;">
      <span class="pub-num">4</span>
      <div>
        <div class="pub-authors">
          Musskopf, M.; Peterson, T.; Machado, I.; Tran Pham Tien, T.; <span class="pub-me">Kirwa, E.</span>; et al.
        </div>
        <div class="pub-title">Assessment of the Relationship Between Bioexclusion Practices Applied in Wean-to-Harvest Sites and PRRS Outbreaks.</div>
        <div class="pub-journal">Veterinary Sciences, 2025 · 12, 1000</div>
        <div class="pub-actions">
          <a class="pub-btn btn-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.3390/vetsci12101000" target="_blank">DOI ↗</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li>
    <div style="display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:10px;">
      <span class="pub-num">3</span>
      <div>
        <div class="pub-authors">
          <span class="pub-me">Kirwa E</span>, Tangen J., Vargas L.B., Musskopf M., et al.
        </div>
        <div class="pub-title">Dynamics of PRRSV Seroconversion and immune-modulating properties of tilmicosin during naive gilt exposure to PRRS LVI.</div>
        <div class="pub-journal">In preparation · 2025</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li>
    <div style="display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:10px;">
      <span class="pub-num">2</span>
      <div>
        <div class="pub-authors">
          <span class="pub-me">Kirwa, E.</span>, Aboge G. O., Maitho, T. E., Mbindyo, C. M., Abuom, T. O., &amp; Mainga, A. O.
        </div>
        <div class="pub-title">Antibiotic profile of <em>Staphylococcus aureus</em> and Coagulase negative <em>Staphylococci</em> from raw camel milk from Garissa County, Kenya.</div>
        <div class="pub-journal">East African Journal of Science, Technology and Innovation, 2021 · 2(4)</div>
        <div class="pub-actions">
          <a class="pub-btn btn-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.37425/eajsti.v2i4.364" target="_blank">DOI ↗</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </li>

  <li>
    <div style="display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:10px;">
      <span class="pub-num">1</span>
      <div>
        <div class="pub-authors">
          Bahati D., Makau D., <span class="pub-me">Kirwa E.</span> &amp; Mutura J.
        </div>
        <div class="pub-title">An assessment on community perspectives and views on natural resource management and its implications to biodiversity conservation.</div>
        <div class="pub-journal">ResearchGate, 2019</div>
        <div class="pub-actions">
          <a class="pub-btn btn-doi" href="http://dx.doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.10344.34566" target="_blank">DOI ↗</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </li>

</ul>

<p style="text-align:center; margin-top:0.5rem;">
  <a href="/publications/" style="color:#E67E22; font-weight:600; text-decoration:none;">
    View full publications list →
  </a>
</p>
```

## Presentations & Talks {#presentations}

```{=html}
<div class="rp-section-chip">🎤 Selected Presentations</div>

<div class="rp-timeline">

  <div class="rp-timeline-item">
    <div class="tl-year">May 2026</div>
    <div class="tl-title">Predicting Farrowing Success to Inform Breeding Decisions in Commercial Swine Herds <span class="tl-type type-oral">Oral</span></div>
    <div class="tl-venue">Symposium on AI in Veterinary Medicine · Ithaca, NY</div>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-timeline-item">
    <div class="tl-year">March 2026</div>
    <div class="tl-title">Leveraging Machine Learning to Predict Subsequent Farrowing Success <span class="tl-type type-oral">Oral</span></div>
    <div class="tl-venue">American Society of Animal Science Midwest · Omaha, NE</div>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-timeline-item">
    <div class="tl-year">March 2026</div>
    <div class="tl-title">Factors Associated with Gilt Retention in Breeding Herds <span class="tl-type type-oral">Oral</span></div>
    <div class="tl-venue">American Society of Animal Science · Omaha, NE</div>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-timeline-item">
    <div class="tl-year">Feb 2026</div>
    <div class="tl-title">Using Field Data to Identify Drivers of Gilt Retention and Lifetime Productivity <span class="tl-type type-invited">Invited</span></div>
    <div class="tl-venue">The Robust Pig Seminar · PIC</div>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-timeline-item">
    <div class="tl-year">2025</div>
    <div class="tl-title">Factors Associated with Gilt Retention <span class="tl-type type-oral">Oral</span></div>
    <div class="tl-venue">International Conference on Pig Livability · Omaha, NE</div>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-timeline-item">
    <div class="tl-year">Spring 2025</div>
    <div class="tl-title">Linking Lactation Feeding Patterns, Litter Performance, and Sow Characteristics to Sow Efficiency Metrics <span class="tl-type type-invited">Invited</span></div>
    <div class="tl-venue">Benchmark Magazine · PigCHAMP, Spring 2025 pp. 6–7</div>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-timeline-item">
    <div class="tl-year">2025</div>
    <div class="tl-title">Practical Strategies to Maximize Sow Efficiency <span class="tl-type type-invited">Invited</span></div>
    <div class="tl-venue">National Hog Farmer</div>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-timeline-item">
    <div class="tl-year">2023</div>
    <div class="tl-title">One Health Concept — The Kenyan Perspective <span class="tl-type type-oral">Oral</span></div>
    <div class="tl-venue">Mandela Washington Fellowship Conference · Minneapolis, MN</div>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-timeline-item">
    <div class="tl-year">2022</div>
    <div class="tl-title">Phenotypic Characterization of Antimicrobial-Resistant <em>S. aureus</em> <span class="tl-type type-poster">Poster</span></div>
    <div class="tl-venue">ESCMID/ASM Conference · Dublin, Ireland</div>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-timeline-item">
    <div class="tl-year">2021</div>
    <div class="tl-title">How Safe is Our Milk on the Shelf? <span class="tl-type type-oral">Oral</span></div>
    <div class="tl-venue">Kenya One Health Conference · ILRI, Nairobi</div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## Research Funding {#funding}

```{=html}
<div class="rp-section-chip">💰 Grant Funding</div>

<p style="color:#5D6D7E; font-size:0.9rem; margin-bottom:1rem;">Awarded: <strong style="color:#1B4F72;">$110,000</strong> &nbsp;|&nbsp; Under Review: <strong style="color:#8E44AD;">$300,000</strong></p>

<div class="rp-grants">

  <div class="rp-grant">
    <div class="funder">Pig Livability · Awarded</div>
    <div class="amount">$30,000</div>
    <h4>Real-Time Surveillance System for Mortality in Wean-to-Finish Lots</h4>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-grant">
    <div class="funder">Pig Livability · Awarded</div>
    <div class="amount">$30,000</div>
    <h4>Early Identification of High-Risk Piglets in Commercial Swine Systems</h4>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-grant">
    <div class="funder">ISU VPR · Awarded</div>
    <div class="amount">$50,000</div>
    <h4>Precision Sow Management System (PSMS)</h4>
  </div>

  <div class="rp-grant pending">
    <div class="funder">USDA-CARE · Under Review</div>
    <div class="amount">$300,000</div>
    <h4>Improving Breeding Herd Efficiency by Unravelling Predictors of Sow Retention, Productivity and Profitability</h4>
  </div>

</div>
```
